headline: Berkshire earnings: Greg Abel still has 'big shoes to fill' as CEO
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK-A, BRK-B) CEO Greg Abel led the charge at the company's annual shareholder meeting over the weekend, the first event since Abel took over from long-time chief executive Warren Buffett at the beginning of this year. Buffett maintains his role as executive chairman on Berkshire's board. CFRA Research vice president Cathy Seifert examines current sentiments around the new CEO and Berkshire's messaging to investors.
